meta.title: Pricing — vngoweb
meta.description: Compare vngoweb plans: Free, WebPro and Ultra — pick the right plan to build a professional website for your business.

heading: vngoweb Pricing
subheading: No hidden fees. Secure payments via PayOS (bank transfer/VietQR).

free.name: Starter (Free)
free.desc: The perfect way to start digitizing your menu and small retail counter.
features: Up to 2 published websites + 2 draft sites
Website URL on the vngoweb.com domain
vngoweb badge shown in the website corner

pro.name: WebPro Business
pro.desc: For shop and brand owners ready to accelerate their sales.
features: Completely remove the vngoweb logo & watermark

ultra.name: Ultra Brand
ultra.desc: Our top-tier plan — built for store chains and growing brands.

subscription.cancelScheduled: Non-renewal confirmed — your plan will revert to Free on {{date}}.
subscription.activeUntil: Your plan is active until {{date}}. After this date, a new payment is required to continue.
subscription.reactivateSuccess: Restored — your plan continues as normal.
subscription.requestFailed: The request could not be completed.
subscription.checkoutFailed: Could not create the payment order. Please try again.
